LanguageData.ABY_AshboundFieldPack.label: ashbound field pack
LanguageData.ABY_AshboundFieldPack.description: A crude abyssal field pack built from residue-lined metal, sealed ember canisters and reinforced harness anchors. It is not a true reactor: it is a low-tier logistics frame that lets an operator carry more breach gear without turning the wearer into a walking altar.
LanguageData.ABY_RiftRelayPack.label: rift relay pack
LanguageData.ABY_RiftRelayPack.description: A stabilized mid-tier relay pack that routes abyssal pressure through a compact back-mounted lattice. The frame improves mobility and load handling, but its controlled rift resonance makes the wearer slightly more receptive to hostile psychic pressure.
LanguageData.ABY_CrownConduitPack.label: crown conduit pack
LanguageData.ABY_CrownConduitPack.description: A dominion-grade conduit pack built around a crowned core fragment and a sealed back-mounted power spine. It functions as a wearable logistics authority: heavier than the lower packs, but strong enough to let a fully equipped operator move under the weight of late abyssal wargear.
